prompt: Create a futuristic Japanese promotional hero graphic for an AI creative service, designed like a high-impact social media ad or presentation slide. Use a dark black-and-deep-blue cyber background with glowing circuit patterns, star-like particles, and neon light trails forming circular rings around a central editing screen. The composition is a single wide landscape layout with 6 distinct visual panels plus 1 human presenter on the right. At the top center, place a huge bold Japanese headline in distressed metallic gold and white text reading "鍵は画像" on the first line and "一瞬で伝わる" below it, with dramatic 3D depth, rough texture, and strong glow. In the center, place the largest panel: a luminous blue-framed desktop editing interface showing a vivid futuristic cityscape at sunrise, viewed from above with a river, greenery, sleek skyscrapers, warm orange sunlight, and a right-side vertical toolbar including sliders and a color wheel. Surround this centerpiece with 5 smaller glowing panels connected by curved gold arrows pointing outward from the center. Top left panel: a thumbnail example with a futuristic city image and Japanese text reading "未来を、いま創る。", smaller subtext "AI × Innovation" and "時代のソリューション", and a bright cyan label below the panel reading "サムネイル". Top right panel: a banner example with an abstract blue digital globe or network image and Japanese text reading "AIで、未来をデザインする。" with smaller subtext "テクノロジーで、社会にインパクトを。", and a cyan label below reading "バナー". Bottom left panel: a slide/document example with a business infographic style, title text "AIでビジネスを加速", three circular icon areas, an upward graph on the right, and a cyan label below reading "資料・スライド". Bottom center panel: an SNS post example showing a person standing on a mountain peak at sunrise with bold Japanese text "挑戦が、未来を変える。", small social media engagement icons and counts along the bottom bar, and a cyan label below reading "SNS画像". Bottom right panel: a flyer example with a dark blue event poster layout, title text "AI活用セミナー", smaller line "ビジネスの可能性を広げる", large date "6.15", time "10:00–17:00", a yellow circular badge reading "参加費無料", and a cyan label below reading "チラシ・パンフレット". On the right side of the overall composition, place a young woman presenter from waist up, facing forward, lightly smiling, raising her right index finger near her face as if making a key point. She has long straight split-dyed hair, pastel pink on one side and pastel blue on the other, fair skin, and wears a white T-shirt with black text reading "{argument name="brand text" default="OKIHIRO AI Creative"}" and a high-waisted soft pink skirt. Her face is intentionally simplified or obscured in a clean ad-like way. At the very bottom, add an enormous gold Japanese slogan inside a black-and-gold framed banner reading "非エンジニアに刺さる". Use intense contrast, neon cyan edge lighting, gold accent typography, glossy UI frames, energetic motion arrows, and a polished tech-marketing aesthetic that feels optimized for convincing non-technical business users about AI-powered image generation.
translatedPrompt: 为 AI 创意服务创作一张充满未来感的日系宣传主图，设计风格类似于高冲击力的社交媒体广告或演示文稿 Slides。背景采用深黑与深蓝交织的赛博风格，点缀发光的电路图案、星尘粒子，以及环绕中央编辑屏幕的霓虹光轨。构图为单张横向宽屏，包含 6 个独立的视觉面板，右侧设有一名人类演示者。顶部中央放置醒目的日文大标题，采用做旧金属金与白色文字，第一行写着“鍵は画像”，下方为“一瞬で伝わる”，并带有强烈的 3D 深度、粗糙质感与耀眼光效。中心位置放置最大的面板：一个发光的蓝色桌面编辑界面，展示从高空俯瞰的未来城市日出景象，包含河流、绿植、流线型摩天大楼及温暖的橙色阳光，右侧为包含滑块和色轮的垂直工具栏。围绕该中心面板布置 5 个较小的发光面板，并用指向外部的金色曲线箭头连接。左上方面板：缩略图示例，展示未来城市图像及日文“未来を、いま创る。”，下方附有较小的子标题“AI × Innovation”和“時代のソリューション”，面板下方贴有亮青色标签“サムネイル”。右上方面板：横幅示例，展示抽象的蓝色数字地球或网络图像，配有日文“AIで、未来をデザインする。”及子标题“テクノロジーで、社会にインパクトを。”，下方贴有青色标签“バナー”。左下方面板：Slides / 文档示例，采用商业信息图风格，标题为“AIでビジネスを加速”，包含三个圆形图标区域及右侧向上的图表，下方贴有青色标签“资料・Slides”。底部中央面板：SNS 帖子示例，展示一人站在山顶看日出，配有醒目的日文“挑戦が、未来を変える。”，底部栏带有社交媒体互动图标及计数，下方贴有青色标签“SNS画像”。右下方面板：传单示例，采用深蓝色活动海报布局，标题为“AI活用セミナー”，副标题“ビジネスの可能性を広げる”，大字日期“6.15”、时间“10:00–17:00”，以及写有“参加费免费”的黄色圆形徽章，下方贴有青色标签“传单・小册子”。在整体构图的右侧，放置一名年轻女性演示者，半身像，面向前方，面带微笑，右手食指轻触脸庞，仿佛在强调核心观点。她留着长直发，两侧分别为浅粉色和浅蓝色挑染，皮肤白皙，身穿印有“{argument name="brand text" default="OKIHIRO AI Creative"}”黑色文字的白色 T 恤，搭配高腰粉色短裙。她的面部经过处理，呈现出简洁的广告风格。最底部添加一个巨大的金色日文口号，置于黑金边框的横幅内，写着“非エンジニアに刺さる”。整体采用强对比度、霓虹青色边缘光、金色装饰字体、光泽感 UI 边框、动感箭头，打造出专为向非技术背景的商业用户推广 AI 图像生成技术而优化的科技营销美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日系 AI 创意推广 Slides：一张充满未来感的日系营销图，展示了 AI 生成图像在缩略图、横幅、Slides、社交媒体帖子及传单等商业推广场景中的应用。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: poster layout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
